bio:
I'm a **Backend Developer** from Anand, Gujarat, India, specializing in building scalable backend systems, REST APIs, and distributed services. I enjoy architecting robust server-side solutions, designing efficient databases, and automating workflows.

My expertise lies in Python and Go backend development with frameworks like FastAPI, Flask, and Echo. I have hands-on experience with event-driven architectures using Kafka and RabbitMQ, cloud infrastructure on AWS, and containerization with Docker. Currently pursuing BTech in Computer Science & Design from GCET while building production-grade systems.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Building scalable REST APIs and microservices using Python, Go, FastAPI, Flask, and Echo.

services.title: Database Design
services.description: Designing and optimizing relational and NoSQL databases — PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis.

services.title: Cloud & DevOps
services.description: Deploying and managing applications on AWS with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and GitHub Actions.

services.title: Event-Driven Systems
services.description: Building real-time data pipelines and messaging systems using Kafka and RabbitMQ.
